description: Headings h1-h6, paragraphs, and inline bold/italic/emphasis runs with wrapping.
visual_assertions: An h1 'Typography Sample' at the top, larger than the h2 below it.
Six heading levels decreasing in size from h1 to h6.
The words 'bold' and 'strong' render heavier than surrounding text.
The final paragraph wraps across at least two lines.
